title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Bengaluru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises!
